title: CS50 2D - Introduction
summary: CS50 2D is Harvard University's introduction to 2D game development, teaching game design and mechanics through analysis of classic games like Pong, Flappy Bird, Breakout, Super Mario Bros., and Pokémon. The course is available through multiple platforms including edX, Harvard Extension School, Harvard Summer School, and OpenCourseWare, with an accompanying active community across Discord, GitHub, and other channels.
